creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Wed, 16 Jun 1999 tsingle@sunland.gsfc.nasa.gov wrote:

>    The bug is the warning:
> 
>      token.c:17: warning: `c' might be used uninitialized in this function

Unless you have patches to fix this, submitting the bug report to us is almost
certain to lead nowhere. Talk to the egcs developers instead..

Kris

because by that time you will be a mile away and have their shoes."
    -- Unknown
